title: Broad codebase survey report
hypothesis: Fusion should be cheaper and as complete: sidekicks fan out over files, the coordinator synthesizes the report.
prompt: Write a file named ARCHITECTURE.md at the project root that documents: (1) every CLI command and what it does, (2) where data is persisted and in what format, (3) the two different error-handling styles used in src/commands and which files use each, and (4) how the test suites are organized, including the fast/slow split and the SLOW_MS variable. Do not change any other file.
